[Insert 1, 2, or 3]
[Insert Negotiation / Networking / Both]

sections.title: The "Work-Ready" Objective
sections.guidance: In 1 sentence: What specific, measurable workplace outcome will the student achieve by the end of this session?

fields.label: The Structural Blueprint
fields.placeholder: The explicit step-by-step messaging framework, linguistic layout, or structural model the student must follow when speaking.

fields.label: Key Linguistic Triggers
fields.placeholder: Provide 2 to 3 exact phrases or sentence-starters that anchor this discourse strategy in business environments.

fields.label: On the Stage (Physical)
fields.placeholder: Define the exact physical mechanic—such as grounding, spatial movement, or open-palm gestures—that must punctuate and support the verbal framework in person.

fields.label: In the Frame (Virtual)
fields.placeholder: Define the exact digital mechanic—such as specific lens-contact calibration, microphone vocal placement, or upper-chest webcam framing—that must support the verbal framework online.

fields.label: Drill Name
fields.placeholder: [Insert Drill Name]

fields.label: The Scenario
fields.placeholder: Contextualize the drill inside a high-stakes business setting, such as an executive cross-border panel, a stakeholder negotiation, or a corporate town hall.

fields.label: The Verbal Execution
fields.placeholder: Step-by-step procedural guidelines on how peers must execute and chain the Verbal Formula during the drill.

fields.label: The Physical Instruction (Offline)
fields.placeholder: Granular, step-by-step instructions on how to physically move, stand, and anchor the delivery inside a physical boardroom or training space.

fields.label: The Virtual Instruction (Online)
fields.placeholder: Granular, step-by-step instructions on how to look, frame oneself, and manage the technical interface when delivering the drill via webcam.

sections.title: Success Metrics (The Global Speaker Bar)
sections.guidance: To pass, the student must flawlessly demonstrate all three tracking pillars simultaneously.

fields.label: Technical Accuracy (Discourse Gate)
fields.placeholder: Explicit checklist item confirming compliance with the structural verbal formula, e.g., "Must state the business impact and ROI prior to citing any data points."

fields.label: Bimodal Fluency (Medium Mastery)
fields.placeholder: Explicit checklist item confirming physical or digital environment control, e.g., "Maintained 100% continuous eye contact with the physical audience during the pivot, or did not drop gaze from the camera lens."

fields.label: Executive Presence (Behavioral Polish)
fields.placeholder: Explicit checklist item defining the total absence of amateur tells, e.g., "Zero vocal filler words, zero physical swaying or micro-expressions of hesitation, and steady breathing pacing."

sections.title: Complexity Shift (The "Pressure" Layer)
sections.guidance: When a group or individual passes the baseline drill early, coaches must instantly apply one of these stress-testing constraints.

fields.label: Time Crunch
fields.placeholder: Explicit instruction detailing how to cut the allowable delivery time in half, forcing immediate compression of the verbal formula without sacrificing structural milestones.

fields.label: Adversarial
fields.placeholder: Explicit instruction detailing a disruptive participant behavior, unexpected stakeholder objection, or live interruption that forces the student to maintain physical composure while deploying the discourse strategy to regain control.

fields.label: The Executive Verbal Pivot
fields.placeholder: Provide an exact, highly professional script/phrase to actively use.

fields.label: The Verbal Amateur Tell
fields.placeholder: Provide the exact phrase, speech-club cliché, or corporate-jargon crutch to explicitly ban.

fields.label: Common Pitfall
fields.placeholder: Highlight the primary behavioral or linguistic mistake students make during this specific drill and how a coach or peer should instantly correct it.

fields.label: Takeaway 1 (Verbal)
fields.placeholder: The immediate Monday-morning linguistic rule or script modification to implement.

fields.label: Takeaway 2 (Non-Verbal)
fields.placeholder: The primary physical adjustment or digital framing configuration required to preserve authority.

fields.label: Takeaway 3 (The Golden Rule)
fields.placeholder: A definitive, single-sentence axiom that defines the operational philosophy of this entire chapter.
